zh.lifeSummary: 當John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell於1430年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡爾德武德時，他的父親Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell22歲，母親Janet Forrester20歲。他和Janet Crichton至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1484年7月22日在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾吉爾特爾享年54歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell于1430年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾卡爾德武德时，他的父亲Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell22岁，母亲Janet Forrester20岁。他和Janet Crichton至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1484年7月22日在英国苏格兰度福利爾吉爾特爾享年54岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利爾。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell was born in 1430, in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell, was 22 and his mother, Janet Forrester, was 20. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Janet Crichton. He died on 22 July 1484, in Kirtle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell est né en 1430, à Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Janet Forrester, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Janet Crichton. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1484, à Kirtle, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell 1430 in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell 22 und seine Mutter Janet Forrester 20. Er hatte mit Janet Crichton mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Juli 1484 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Kirtle, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell è nato il nel 1430 nel Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Janet Forrester, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Janet Crichton. Morì il 22 luglio 1484, nel Kirtle, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwellが1430年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカルデルウッドで生まれた時，父Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwellは22歳，母Janet Forresterは20歳であった。彼はJanet Crichtonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1484年7月22日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアキルトルで54歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell(이)가 1430년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 캘더우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Forrester(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Janet Crichton(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 7월 22일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 커틀에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell nasceu em 1430, em Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Janet Forrester, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Janet Crichton. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1484, em Kirtle, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell родился в 1430 г. в местности калдирвуд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Forrester, 20. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Janet Crichton. Он умер 22 июля 1484 г. в местности киртл, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell nació en 1430, en Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Janet Forrester, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Janet Crichton. Murió el 22 de julio de 1484, en Kirtle, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
